title: BEM-950 force evidence files
objective:
Run script: """
import json
from pathlib import Path
now_utc3 = '2026-05-31 | 13:15 (UTC+3)'
paths = [
'governance/state/object_passports.json','governance/state/elements_registry.json','governance/state/contours_registry.json','governance/state/providers_registry.json','governance/state/contour_provider_policy.json','governance/state/experience_registry.json','governance/state/managed_channel_schema.json','governance/state/contour_lifecycle_schema.json','governance/state/release_proof_manifest.json','governance/validators','governance/runners','governance/prompts/templates','governance/prompts/providers','governance/prompts/handlers','governance/tests','governance/gates','governance/audit']
checked = {p: Path(p).exists() for p in paths}
resolved = sum(1 for v in checked.values() if v)
blocked = len(checked) - resolved
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/state').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = '# BEM-950 | FORCE EVIDENCE FILES FOR CLAUDE REMARKS RESPONSE

Created: '+now_utc3+'

## Verdict
NO_RELEASE_PASS. Foundation evidence is being recorded, but remote/release proof remains blocked because Deno status reported commit_sha=null for BEM-948 and BEM-949.

| Scope | Count | Status |
|---|---:|---|
| BEM-950 actions | 3/4 | Evidence files created; remote SHA still blocked |
| BEM-931 foundation blocks | 14/14 | Foundation file families expected/checked |
| Release proof gates | 0/4 | remote SHA, production Telegram, live LLM, Claude re-audit remain blockers |

## Artifact matrix
| Path | Exists |
|---|---|
' + ''.join('| '+p+' | '+str(v)+' |
' for p,v in checked.items()) + '
## Policy
BEM-932..945 local summaries are not release proof when GitHub push failed. Release PASS requires non-null remote SHA and external audit approval.
'
Path('governance/reports/BEM950_FORCE_EVIDENCE_FILES.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
status = {'bem_id':'BEM-950','status':'NO_RELEASE_PASS','created_at_utc3':now_utc3,'checked_paths':checked,'resolved_count':resolved,'blocked_count':blocked,'bem931_foundation_blocks':'14/14','release_gates':'0/4','release_pass':False,'blockers':['remote_non_null_sha','production_telegram_gate','live_llm_runtime_gate','external_claude_reaudit']}
Path('governance/state/bem950_force_evidence_files.json').write_text(json.dumps(status,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    old = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    entry = '

### BEM-950 | FORCE EVIDENCE FILES | 2026-05-31 | 13:15 (UTC+3)
- Created `governance/reports/BEM950_FORCE_EVIDENCE_FILES.md`.
- Created `governance/state/bem950_force_evidence_files.json`.

    if 'BEM-950 | FORCE EVIDENCE FILES' not in old:
